name: Ranch Style Pork Chops
recipeInstructions:
1. Place meat in a large shallow baking dish.
2. Season with salt and pepper.
3. Top with dried figs and apples.
4. Sprinkle with brown sugar and cinnamon.
5. Dot each chop with a dab of jelly.
6. Bake, uncovered, for 40 minutes at 350 degrees F.
7. Uncover and bake an additional 20 minutes.
